reapack.name: ReaDLP.lua
reapack.desc: ReaDLP - yt-dlp audio downloader for REAPER

version.author: ReaDLP contributors
version.changelog: Prepared the public ReaPack package layout. Added a ReaPack metadata header. Reworked the main UI into tabs for a smaller, cleaner window.

version.author: ReaDLP contributors
version.changelog: Updated public package metadata and generic example paths. Prepared the public ReaPack package layout. Added a ReaPack metadata header. Reworked the main UI into tabs for a smaller, cleaner window.
